name: relay-browser
description: Plain multi-screen Electron browser with guarded activity sync and Tor remote-DNS routing.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/page-preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
